step_rationale: Acylcarnitine from fatty acid β-oxidation; elevated in ischemic cardiomyocyte injury.
mechanism: Acylcarnitine accumulation reflects impaired mitochondrial fatty-acid oxidation and energy crisis in ischemic myocardium.

references.title: Metabolomics Analysis Identifies Differential Metabolites as Biomarkers for Acute Myocardial Infarction.
